title: Baw resonator with increased quality factor
abstract: A BAW resonator comprises a center area (CA), an underlap region (UL) surrounding the center area having a thickness smaller than the thickness d c of the center region and a frame region (FR), surrounding the underlap region having thickness d F greater than d c.
claims:
Claims Claims 1. A BAW resonator comprising - a substrate (SU) - a sandwich formed of - a bottom electrode (BE) - a piezoelectric layer (PL) - a top electrode (TE) - a dielectric layer (DL) covering the whole surface of the BAW resonator (BR) wherein the sandwich comprises - a center area (CA) wherein the three layers of the sandwich overlap each other - an underlap region (UL) surrounding the center area having a thickness du smaller than the thickness dc of the center region - a frame region (FR) , surrounding the underlap region having a thickness d F greater than dc. 2. The BAW resonator of the foregoing claim, wherein the reduced thickness du in the underlap region (UL) is mainly due to a reduced thickness of bottom electrode (BE) and/or top electrode (TE) . 3. The BAW resonator of the foregoing claim, wherein one of bottom (BE) and top electrode (TE) comprises a first sub-layer of a AlCu and a second sub-layer of W wherein the thickness of one of these sub-layers is reduced in the underlap region (UL) . 4. The BAW resonator of one of the foregoing claims, 

wherein the bottom electrode (BE) has a thickness in underlap region the smaller than the respective thickness thereof in the center area. 5. The BAW resonator of one of the foregoing claims, wherein the dielectric layer (DL) has a uniform thickness over the total surface of the BAW resonator (BR) . 6. The BAW resonator of one of the foregoing claims, arranged in ladder type circuit of series resonators (BRs) and shunt resonators (BRp) , each series and shunt resonator being embodied as the BAW resonator as claimed above wherein the dielectric layer (DL) is a trimming layer. 7. The BAW resonator of one of the foregoing claims, wherein the dielectric layer (DL) is a trimming layer formed of SiN layer and the uniform thickness of the trimming layer is about 60nm. 8. The BAW resonator of one of the foregoing claims, wherein the thickness of the respective electrode is reduced in the underlap region (UL) relative to the center area (CA) by about 15nm. 9. The BAW resonator of one of the foregoing claims, wherein the underlap region (UL) has a width of about 0.2ym to 8. Oym 10. The BAW resonator of one of the foregoing claims, wherein the frame region (FR) is formed by a dielectric interlayer (IL) arranged between top electrode (TE) and piezoelectric layer (PL) .
